Home | News

DeepSeek-V4-Pro and DeepSeek-V4-Flash Model Release

April 24, 2026

We are excited to announce the release of DeepSeek-V4-Pro and DeepSeek-V4-Flash.

Overview

DeepSeek-V4-Pro is our most capable model to date, achieving state-of-the-art results across coding, math, and reasoning benchmarks. DeepSeek-V4-Flash is a smaller, faster variant optimized for latency-sensitive workloads.

API Availability

Both models are available via the DeepSeek API. The models can be accessed as deepseek-v4-pro and deepseek-v4-flash.

Note: deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner will be deprecated on 2026-06-01. Please migrate to the new model identifiers.

Open Weights

Open model weights are available on Hugging Face: DeepSeek-V4-Pro weights (evidence only, not a release source).

Technical Report

For full details see the DeepSeek-V4 Technical Report.

Benchmarks

On MMLU, DeepSeek-V4-Pro achieves 92.1%. On HumanEval, it achieves 95.3%. On MATH, it achieves 88.7%. These results are vendor-reported and have not yet been independently verified.

Safety

A system card and safety evaluation report are available at DeepSeek-V4 Safety Report.
